title: bromus carinatus var. maritimus
intro: Bromus carinatus var. maritimus, also known as the sea brome, is a type of grass that grows in coastal areas and is a variant of the California brome. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Bromus carinatus var. maritimus include soothing digestive issues and relieving respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
